---
title: "Customer Marketing Spend and Purchase Dataset"
author: "Abhigna Tippala"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
data <- read_csv("data/36879932_Abhigna Tippala.csv")
```
